prompt: Create a serene cinematic fantasy landscape of a misty lotus pond at sunrise, wide 16:9 composition. In the center, place one elegant great blue heron standing still in shallow reflective water, its long legs mirrored on the pond surface, head turned slightly to the side in a quiet contemplative pose. Surround the foreground with large green lily pads and exactly 9 prominent pink lotus elements: 6 fully open pink lotus blossoms and 3 closed pink lotus buds, distributed across the left foreground, center foreground, and right foreground. On the far left, add a large old weeping cherry tree with dark twisting branches and long curtains of delicate pale pink blossoms hanging down over the water. The background should show a calm lake fading into soft morning mist, dense evergreen forest silhouettes and flowering trees on the hills, and a small traditional pavilion partly hidden on the right shore. The sun should sit low near the upper center-right, casting warm golden-orange light, visible rays, and glowing reflections across the water. Use a dreamy, tranquil mood inspired by silence and solitude, with soft haze, pastel pinks, peach sky tones, teal-green foliage, realistic details, cinematic depth, volumetric light, crisp foreground flowers, subtle ripples, and no people, no text, no watermark.
